# TapYourBoat

> Boat rental and charter platform in Greece. Find and book boats, yachts, and sailing vessels for your next adventure.

## About

TapYourBoat is a boat rental marketplace connecting boat owners with travelers looking for boat charters and rentals across Greek destinations. Whether you're looking for a sailboat, motorboat, catamaran, or yacht, TapYourBoat makes it easy to find and book the perfect vessel.

## Boat Types Available

- Motorboats
- Sailboats
- Catamarans
- RIBs (Rigid Inflatable Boats)
- Yachts
- Boats without licence required

## Charter Options

- Bareboat (self-skippered)
- With professional skipper
- Day trips and multi-day charters
- Half-day rentals available on select boats

## Service Area

Greece — including Athens, Mykonos, Santorini, Corfu, Crete, Rhodes, and other Greek islands and coastal destinations.
